title: Keep live adapters evidence-first
context: Roadmap adapters now cover NotebookLM, GSD2, worktree, Playwright, CI, CodeRabbit, infrastructure, and OpenScorpion surfaces.
decision: Keep adapters as file-contract and evidence-record producers until each live integration has an approved mutation or submission path.
consequences: External systems are not mutated by default
Humans can inspect artifacts before enabling live adapters
Future work can add narrow approved live connectors
